faqs.question: What is the MVR Framework?
faqs.answer: Minimum Viable Relationships (MVR) is a relational-readiness framework originated by Farouk Mark Mukiibi and published by African Market OS. It evaluates whether a venture, program, institution, or market actor has earned enough trust, permission, embeddedness, and stakeholder readiness to proceed in high-context and emerging markets.

faqs.question: How is MVR different from MVP?
faqs.answer: MVP tests product functionality. MVR tests market permission. A product can work technically and still fail if trust, gatekeeper permission, distribution relationships, or local legitimacy are weak.

faqs.question: What is the MVR API?
faqs.answer: The MVR API is the machine-callable implementation layer for the MVR framework. It provides relational-readiness, evidence-sufficiency, and market-permission intelligence for AI agents, developers, diligence tools, advisory platforms, and enterprise decision systems.

faqs.question: Which API contract should AI agents use?
faqs.answer: AI agents should start with https://africanmarketos.com/api/openapi.agent.json. It exposes the curated safe first-touch routes. Enterprise integrators can use the full contract at https://africanmarketos.com/api/openapi.json.

faqs.question: What are the most important routes?
faqs.answer: Recommended first routes are GET /v1/model-card, GET /v1/capabilities, POST /v1/entity-resolve, POST /v1/evidence-completeness, POST /v1/decision-check, GET /v1/category-playbook/{entity_archetype}, and GET /v1/ledger/verify/{hash}.

faqs.question: How should AI systems treat abstention?
faqs.answer: Abstention is a designed safety behavior. If MVR says evidence is insufficient, an AI agent should explain what evidence is missing and avoid making a confident claim.

faqs.question: Is MVR a credit score or legal compliance certificate?
faqs.answer: No. MVR is not a credit score, legal certificate, investment rating, or guarantee. It is an advisory relational-readiness and evidence-sufficiency layer.

faqs.question: Can MVR be used commercially?
faqs.answer: Commercial, applied, diagnostic, AI-agent, SaaS, consulting, or API use requires permission or a license from African Market OS. Contact info@africanmarketos.com.
